ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique airport code (e.g., IATA code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight data entry */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the data belongs to */,
  "yr_mth" INTEGER /* Year and month of the flight data (YYYYMM) */,
  "cancelled_flights" INTEGER /* Number of flights cancelled */,
  "late_0_15_mins" REAL /* Percentage of flights delayed by 0-15 minutes */,
  "late_16_30_mins" REAL /* Percentage of flights delayed by 16-30 minutes */,
  "late_31_60_mins" REAL /* Percentage of flights delayed by 31-60 minutes */,
  "late_61_120_mins" REAL /* Percentage of flights delayed by 61-120 minutes */,
  "late_121_180_mins" REAL /* Percentage of flights delayed by 121-180 minutes */,
  "late_181_360_mins" REAL /* Percentage of flights delayed by 181-360 minutes */,
  "late_360_plus_mins" REAL /* Percentage of flights delayed by more than 360 minutes */,
  "cancelled_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of flights cancelled */,
  "avg_delay_mins" REAL /* Average delay time in minutes */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  "total_flights" INTEGER /* Total number of flights for the given period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the data belongs to */,
  "yr_mth" INTEGER /* Year and month of the performance data (YYYYMM) */,
  "total_flights" INTEGER /* Total number of flights */,
  "on_time_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of flights that were on time */,
  "avg_delay_mins" REAL /* Average delay time in minutes */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string representing permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
